items.title: Apple ships local Linux containers
items.oneliner: Run OCI Linux containers on Apple silicon Macs with a signed CLI built on macOS virtualization.

items.title: Open document app UI kit
items.oneliner: React components for PDF, DOCX, XLSX, and CSV viewers with citations, e-signing, uploads, and schema builder.

items.title: Rust verification with Hax
items.oneliner: Formally verify Rust code with an open-source toolchain aimed at high-assurance and security-critical software.

items.title: Single-file messenger over GitHub
items.oneliner: Clone a one-file HTML messenger that stores chats in Git repos and works directly in the browser.

items.title: Safer patterns for untrusted SQL
items.oneliner: Concrete SQLite, PostgreSQL, and DuckDB safety patterns for running untrusted SQL with read-only access and time limits.

items.title: Cross-browser glass effect tutorial
items.oneliner: Hands-on CSS walkthrough for shipping glassmorphism that stays readable and performs consistently across browsers.

items.title: Arabic typography rendering guide
items.oneliner: Interactive deep dive into Arabic web rendering bugs, font choices, and the fixes needed beyond basic CSS.

items.title: Linux latency measurement walkthrough
items.oneliner: Measure click-to-photon latency on Linux with a Teensy rig and compositor tuning notes from real tests.

items.title: Build your own shading language
items.oneliner: Detailed compiler diary for a custom shading language, including parser design and Apple Silicon portability tradeoffs.

items.title: TTT grammar inference tutorial
items.oneliner: Step through the TTT algorithm for learning regular languages from examples with practical implementation detail.
